sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_search (id Int32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_search VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'Goodbye World');
SELECT id FROM test_search WHERE ngramSearchCaseInsensitive(description, 'hello') > 0;
UPDATE test_search SET description = 'Hello Everyone' WHERE ngramSearchCaseInsensitive(description, 'Goodbye') > 0;
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitive(description, 'world') AS match_score FROM test_search;
